nasb.text: For it is better, if God should will it so, that you suffer for doing what is right rather than for doing what is wrong.

esv.text: For it is better to suffer for doing good, if that should be God’s will, than for doing evil.

cnv.text: 如果　神的旨意是要你們受苦，那麼為行善受苦，總比為行惡受苦好。

ccb.text: 如果上帝的旨意是要你们因行善而受苦，这也总比你们因作恶而受苦强。

csbs.text: 要知道，即使神的旨意要你们因行善而受苦，也比因作恶而受苦更好，
